examples: Thanks to her microchip, Roxy was soon returned to her grateful owner.
Without the microchip, the cat would never be able to come home again.
Call the microchip company to match the number to the information of its owner.
In Wednesday trading, Microchip Technology, Inc. shares are currently down about 0.3% on the day.
Animal warden Sue Knight used a microchip detector over Diesel's skin and found Ms Chapman's details.
